About Us

Cleaning with Care & Perfection

सAFA Cleaning Service was founded in Gangtok with one conviction — every space deserves to be clean, safe, and welcoming. In our first two months, we have built a reputation on professionalism, attention to detail, and a genuine care for our clients.

Our mission is to deliver reliable, high-quality cleaning services. Our vision is to become Sikkim's most trusted hygiene and cleaning partner.

Trust & Reliability
Verified, trained professionals you can confidently welcome into your space.
Eco-Friendly Approach
Safe, biodegradable products — effective for your space, gentle for the planet.
Uncompromising Quality
Every job is completed to the highest standard — no shortcuts, ever.

What We Offer

Our Services

From recurring maintenance to one-time deep cleans — every service is delivered with the same standard of care and professionalism.

Subscription Services

Consistent, scheduled cleaning for homes and offices — so your space is always at its best.

  • Daily cleaning plans
  • Weekly home maintenance
  • Monthly office packages
  • Priority scheduling
  • Dedicated assigned cleaner
Book Now
Full Project Cleaning

Comprehensive cleaning solutions for significant transitions and deep restoration.

  • Deep cleaning sessions
  • Move-in / Move-out cleaning
  • Post-construction cleanup
  • End-of-tenancy cleaning
  • Carpet & upholstery care
Book Now
Customisable Services

Tailored cleaning packages built entirely around your specific needs and schedule.

  • Bespoke cleaning packages
  • Client-defined scope & schedule
  • Event preparation cleaning
  • Special occasion setups
  • Add-on services on demand
Get a Quote
